name: Kingdom: Classic
short_description: Kingdom is a 2D sidescrolling strategy/resource management hybrid with a minimalist feel wrapped in a beautiful, modern pixel art aesthetic.
detailed_description:
Wise Rulers know their kingdom will fall,
Brave Rulers do not despair.
Great Rulers know their riches can rule,
And spend every coin with great care.

In Kingdom, each coin spent can tip the balance between prosperity and decay. Attend to your domain, border to border, or venture into the wild to discover its wonders and its threats. Master the land, build your defenses, and when the darkness comes, stand with your people, crown on your head, until the very end.

Gameplay
Kingdom is a 2D sidescrolling strategy/resource management hybrid with a minimalist feel wrapped in a beautiful, modern pixel art aesthetic. Play the role of a king or queen atop their horse and enter a procedurally generated realm primed to sustain a kingdom, then toss gold to peasants and turn them into your loyal subjects in order to make your kingdom flourish. Protect your domain at night from the greedy creatures looking to steal your coins and crown, and explore the nearby, mysterious forests to discover curious and cryptic artifacts to aid your kingdom.

supported_languages: English, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Danish, Finnish, Norwegian, Portuguese - Brazil, Swedish

reviews.review_text:
Looks simple, doesn’t it? SIKE. It was hard as hell to get the Day 100 achievement. The control scheme and gameplay are very simple but to get to certain point, u gotta spend some time either study or go through trial and error to get it right. The game doesn't really give much of an explanation, which leaves new players confused at the beginning.

One funny problem I ran into: if you have too many archers and they all drop their coin loot at once, the game can actually lag your graphics. Not sure whether I should laugh or cry about it cause it definitely means I'm too rich to handle. Overall, the game is highly repeatable and replayable, rating it 8 out of 10.

Si eres una persona capaz de ser paciente, tener buen ojo para el detalle, y disfrutas de la estrategia. 
Sin ser un temerario que deja su pueblo a la suerte con el desafortunado destino que eso conlleva.
Entonces quizás~ seas digno de conservar la corona y tu reino. 
¡Y de que te guste el juego! 

·.·.·.·.·.·.·✨🏰👑✨·.·.·.·.·.·.·

 Te puedes dejar llevar con su música y su estética, pero si te relajas mucho aún desde el inicio, no lograrás cumplir con las presiones que más adelante te exigirá el juego. No es fácil desde un inicio, ir descubriendo las mecánicas del juego, y como organizar tiempo, distancia, seguridad y recursos. Aunque la comunidad hoy en día comparte muy buenos tips para lograr superarte más rápido. Especialmente buena si quieres completar los logros del juego, ya que algunos están buggeados, no están bien descritos, ni resulta obvio como realmente se desbloquean. A pesar de este defecto, vale la pena tomar los retos de desbloquearlos, te hacen tener distintas estrategias para lograr metas diversas, que al final pueden ser retos satisfactorios de superar, y le da más diversidad a las posibilidades que tiene el juego para ofrecerte. Ha sido bonito explorar muchas de sus posibilidades, aun si cada derrota ha sido frustrante.

✨ Me siento digna de mis coronas. He conquistado el juego. ✨
🎉✨🎊✨ Me he graduado como reina. (?) ✨🎊✨🎉

.✩‧₊˚👑˚₊‧✩.
╰(*°▽°*)╯
super cute game. easy to learn, and the difficulty increase in each wave keeps it entertaining and enjoyable even with it's simplicity.
